rejected_candidates.title: Redemptions ignore pair insolvency and let early redeemers drain distressed collateral at par
rejected_candidates.reason: `redeemCollateral()` intentionally redeems at the oracle exchange rate and explicitly socializes the collateral loss via `redemptionWriteOff`; absent contrary spec or upstream registry logic, this reads as a protocol design choice rather than a clear implementation flaw.
